description: Digests based on a single strong signal should still produce useful synthesis.

output.title: Review: emergency grant deadline approaching
output.summary: A climate disaster relief grant with a 48-hour window was flagged from the capture pipeline.
output.whyItMatters: The coop's recent flood documentation qualifies as supporting evidence — missing this deadline means waiting for the next cycle.
output.suggestedNextStep: Assign one member to draft the application using existing flood documentation by end of day.
highlights: FEMA Community Resilience Fund: application closes Friday at 5pm ET.
